text.title: Requirements Documentation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end. Each step names inputs, actions, outputs, and optional decision-gates.

step.name: pick-doc-type
step.action: Choose BRD (business audience) / SRS (engineering audience) / user-story (Scrum backlog).

step.name: structure-skeleton
step.action: Generate skeleton from template; inject project metadata.

step.name: write-requirements
step.action: Fill requirement statements + IDs + AC links + status.

step.name: validate-schema
step.decision-gate: Reject if AC missing or fields incomplete.

step.name: route-for-review
step.action: Route via T3 governance approver; capture signoff metadata.
